name: Poblano and Potato Side Dish
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast and peel the poblanos. Cut them into 1/2-inch pieces.
2. Cook the potatoes in a steamer, microwave, or boiling water. Cut them into 4 pieces.
3. Fry the onions in vegetable oil until transparent. Add the peppers, then add the potatoes, epazote, salt, and pepper.
4. Add the cheese (if using) and serve.
